examples: Tess did not look after him, but slowly wound along the crooked lane.
Tess would like a dollar for every time she had heard that word misused by television journalists.
Thomas Hardy's Tess of the D'Urbervilles is regarded as the landmark of English literary history.
He found himself putting Tess to bed before he had time to completely unwind from work.
Tess Gallagher, that Irish lass, I like to have fallen in love with her.
